RiskColoring: Risk coloring: red below 40, amber 40–70, green above 70.
AssessmentWorkspace: Assessment workspace pairs the NIS2 questionnaire with evidence review.
InviteNewVendors: Invite new vendors from the vendor list; changes persist to the database.

SettingsDesc: Manage your workspace preferences and compliance parameters.

ResidencyMessage: Your active workspace is configured to route vendor evidence strictly to the designated endpoint above.
LocalResidencyNote: Air-gapped internal telemetry guarantees zero EU-egress.
EUResidencyNote: Enterprise agreements ensure strict EU data residency alignment via Mistral platforms.
SelectAIProvider: Select your preferred AI provider for NIS2 assessments. Data processing location affects compliance.

LocaleLandingReady: AVRA is ready in your selected language.
ExternalExitTitle: You have exited the vendor portal
ExternalExitDesc: Your external assessment session has been closed. You can now safely close this tab.
ExternalPortalDesc: Enter your access code and temporary password to open your isolated NIS2 assessment workspace.
ForcePasswordDesc: Replace the temporary password with one only you know. This secures your assessment workspace permanently.

submitted.title: Assessment submitted
submitted.description: Thank you for providing your compliance data. Your responses for {vendorName} have been securely shared with your buyer.
submitted.validUntil: You can access this link until {expiry}.
submitted.closeHint: You can now close this window.

welcome.title: Welcome to the AVRA Assessment Portal
welcome.subtitle: Securing the supply chain for Adventure Huso.
welcome.purposeBody1: The European Union's NIS2 Directive requires organizations to ensure the security of their supply chains. As a valued partner of Adventure Huso, we invite you to complete this security assessment.
welcome.purposeBody2: This process helps us maintain a high security standard and fulfill our regulatory obligations. You can either upload existing security documentation for AI-assisted analysis or complete the questionnaire manually.
welcome.fastPathBody: Upload your ISO 27001, SOC2, or policy PDF and let AI suggest your answers.
welcome.directPathBody: Answer 20 targeted security questions directly in our interactive wizard.
welcome.footer: Secure isolated environment - Powered by AVRA Sovereign Compliance Engine

fastPath.title: The fast way
fastPath.description: Upload your security policy or certification (ISO 27001, SOC2). Our AI will analyze your documents to pre-fill the questionnaire.

noAiTraining.title: No AI training
noAiTraining.body: Your documents are never used to train or improve the underlying AI models.

euHosted.title: EU-hosted (Germany)
euHosted.body: All analysis is processed on isolated, sovereign servers in Frankfurt (eu-central-1).

stateless.title: Stateless analysis
stateless.body: Documents exist only in memory during analysis. Nothing is stored permanently; files are discarded immediately after.

tls.title: TLS 1.3 encryption
tls.body: Your data is encrypted in transit using high industry standards.

externalAssessment.importantMessage: Important: AI-suggested answers appear as highlights. You must verify and confirm them in the questionnaire to complete your submission.

errors.unexpectedSave: Unexpected error while saving. Please retry.

questionnaireWizard.fallbackFindings: Based on your documents, this requirement appears to be met.
questionnaireWizard.justificationPlaceholder: Explain why this status applies. You can edit AI-generated reasoning before saving.
questionnaireWizard.justificationHint: This text is editable and will be sanitized on save.

q1.text: Does the vendor maintain a documented information security policy approved by management?
q1.guidance: Policy should cover roles, acceptable use, and review cadence.

q2.text: Is there a designated security officer or equivalent accountable for cybersecurity?

q3.text: Are cybersecurity risks assessed at least annually and after major changes?

q4.text: Is multi-factor authentication enforced for all administrative and remote access?

q5.text: Are least-privilege and role-based access controls applied to production systems?

q6.text: Is access reviewed periodically and revoked promptly on role change or offboarding?

q7.text: Is personal and sensitive data classified, with handling rules documented?

q8.text: Are data processing agreements and subprocessors documented and kept current?

q9.text: Is data encrypted in transit and at rest using industry-accepted algorithms?

q10.text: Are cryptographic keys generated, stored, and rotated according to a defined process?

q11.text: Is use of customer-managed keys or HSMs supported where required?

q12.text: Are security logs collected centrally with retention aligned to regulatory needs?

q13.text: Is 24/7 monitoring in place for critical services with defined escalation paths?

q14.text: Are vulnerability management and patch SLAs defined and evidenced?

q15.text: Does the vendor maintain an incident response plan with customer notification clauses?

q16.text: Are incident exercises or tabletop tests performed and improvements tracked?

q17.text: Are business continuity and disaster recovery plans tested with defined RTO/RPO?

q18.text: Is secure SDLC practiced (threat modeling, code review, dependency scanning)?

q19.text: Are third-party components and open-source licenses tracked and monitored?

q20.text: Are penetration tests or independent security assessments performed regularly?

sessionExpired.title: Session expired
sessionExpired.description: Your temporary access window has ended. Please contact your admin to request a new access code.

submission.deadlinePassed: Submission deadline passed at {expiry}. Request a new link from your administrator.

manualOverride.justificationPlaceholder: Explain why you are overriding this answer...

pdfUpload.uploadEvidenceDescription: Use one audit-ready PDF as the single source of truth for AI analysis and later verification.

success.title: Invite delivered
success.description: Credentials split across two channels for {vendorName}.
success.emailStatus: Email sent - portal link and access code delivered.
success.securityHint: The vendor must change their password immediately on first login. The temporary password is never stored in plain text and cannot be retrieved.

form.title: Send Secure Invite
form.description: The access code goes by email; the temporary password goes by SMS. The two credentials never travel together.

vendors.copyCredFailed: Copy failed. Please copy the value manually.
vendors.credDialogDesc: Copy both credentials before closing. The temporary password cannot be recovered after this dialog is dismissed.
